stemHtml: At Tenerife 1977, one aircraft reported "we are now at take-off" and the tower replied "OK, stand by for take-off" — but neither message was received by the other. What is the likely explanation?

options.a: The tower's message must have been received — ground transmitters have greater range.
options.b: The crew was focused on take-off and missed the transmission.
options.c: A receiver failure on the departing aircraft.
options.d: Simultaneous transmissions on one frequency blocked each other out.
